meta.title: What Is Your Ick Factor? Free Ick Sensitivity Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Swipe through 20 behaviors to discover your ick sensitivity level! Are you an Unbothered Legend or an Ick Overlord? Free test with category breakdown.

app.title: What Is Your Ick Factor? - Ick Sensitivity Test
app.subtitle: How sensitive is your ick radar?
app.description: Swipe through 20 everyday behaviors. Swipe right if it gives you the ick, left if you're fine with it. How picky are you really?

cards.c4: Leaves dishes in the sink for days
cards.c8: Posts every meal on social media
cards.c9: Laughs at their own jokes loudly
cards.c10: Leaves you on read for days
cards.c13: Baby talks to their partner in public
cards.c14: Uses astrology to justify bad behavior
cards.c18: Sends voice messages instead of texts
cards.c19: Uses too many emojis in texts
cards.c20: Slow walks in the middle of the sidewalk

unbothered.name: Unbothered Legend
unbothered.desc: Nothing fazes you. You could watch someone eat cereal with water and just shrug. Your tolerance is legendary.

chill.name: Pretty Chill
chill.desc: You have standards but you're flexible about it. A few things bug you, but mostly you let things slide.

detector.name: Ick Detector
detector.desc: Your ick radar is perfectly calibrated. You notice things others miss but you're not unreasonable about it.

magnet.name: Ick Magnet
magnet.desc: You spot icks everywhere you go. Your friends have learned to tread carefully around you.

overlord.name: Ick Overlord
overlord.desc: Your standards are astronomical. Almost everything gives you the ick. Living with you must be an extreme sport.

result.noIcks: Nothing gives you the ick! Truly unbothered.
result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants share your ick sensitivity level

share.title: Share Your Ick Factor
share.text: I got {count}/20 icks! My ick sensitivity: "{tier}" 🤢 Check yours:

engage.result1: Unbothered Legend -- 0-5 icks, Nothing Fazes You
engage.result4: Ick Overlord -- 16-20 icks, Everything Is an Ick

about.heading1: How the Ick Factor Test Works
about.text1: The Ick Factor Test presents 20 common behaviors across categories like dating, hygiene, social media, and communication. Swipe right if the behavior gives you the ick, left if it is fine. Your total count and category breakdown reveal your ick sensitivity profile.
about.text2: An ick is that sudden feeling of cringe or repulsion toward a behavior. Everyone has different ick triggers. This test helps you discover yours in a fun way and compare with friends to see who is the pickiest!
